ground_truth.title: Queen Creek, AZ Pest Control & Termite Control Specialists
ground_truth.main_content: Termio Pest Control delivers the best pest control in Queen Creek, AZ and the Phoenix area. If you're looking for protection from ants, spiders, termites, or other pests, Termio Pest Control is here to help! With same day service available, we protect homes from ants, spiders, scorpions, termites, and other pests. Termio Pest Control is a locally owned and family operated pest control company, making us the local experts you can count on to eliminate insect and rodent infestations. We offer eco-friendly pest control that is tough on pests but not the environment, using eco-conscious products and services. All services are backed by our satisfaction guarantee, delivering peace of mind with every service. The pest professionals at Termio are passionate about helping property owners resolve pest problems, no matter how tough. Contact us for a free inspection or call (602) 900-0807 to schedule service. Service areas include Chandler, Gilbert, Gold Canyon, Goodyear, Mesa, New River, Peoria, Phoenix, Queen Creek, Scottsdale, Surprise, and Tempe.
